description: New york for men from playboy is inspired by the famous and fashionable city. Top notes are aldehydes and lime chords, the heart comprises green apple, elemi and black pepper, followed by the base of vetiver, tonka bean and vanilla..Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
